hooks.command: ROOT=$(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1 | awk '{print $1}'); [ -z "$ROOT" ] && ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if grep -rq "^In progress" "${ROOT}/docs/designs"/*/session-state.md 2>/dev/null; then printf '{"systemMessage": "Active feature work in progress — ask Claude to update session-state.md and progress.md before closing."}'; fi
